samples.text: All fish live in water. A salmon is a fish. Therefore, does a salmon live in water?
Every fish inhabits aquatic environments. A salmon belongs to the category of fish. Does this mean a salmon lives in water?
All aquatic fish species reside in water. A salmon is an aquatic fish species. Therefore, does a salmon reside in water?
A salmon is classified as a fish. Fish are animals that live in water. Based on this information, does a salmon live in water?
All fish live in water. A salmon is a fish. Salmon are often pink in color. Therefore, does a salmon live in water?
